page.title: Skills
page.bannerDescription: Install the right skills so writing, research, and organizing work can be safely delegated.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search skills (press Enter to search market)

empty.builtinDesc: Built-in skills from the resources directory are synced automatically at startup and on refresh.
empty.customDesc: Click "Install Skill" to add a custom skill from Git or a local archive.
empty.globalDesc: Use npx skills add to install global skills.
empty.marketDesc: Try another category or search by keyword above.

delete.title: Delete Skill
delete.message: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

market.quotaHint: If this happens often, add a SkillsMP API Key in Settings to increase your quota.

installDialog.fromGitDesc: Clone a Skill from GitHub, GitLab, or another Git repository
installDialog.fromZipDesc: Import a Skill from a local .zip archive

detail.missingPath: This skill is missing its SKILL.md path and cannot be opened.
